refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Integrate packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment algorithms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically isolates communication quality management, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding latency constraints to the FR to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: All software and hardware components responsible for teleoperation communication management and protocol implementation.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics and packet loss status.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused on teleoperation specifics; higher diffusion risk.
Vehicle module primarily handles physical control, less relevant for communication protocol.
Highest containment score; focused responsibility reduces diffusion risk.
Safety services monitor alerts but do not manage communication protocols.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning the DP to the Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution module if communication monitoring is duplicated.
Dependency on Network Link interface reliability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface ownership and responsibilities between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to avoid duplication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping and measurable performance criteria.

diffusion_risks: Possible duplication of communication monitoring functions across modules.
Interface dependency on Network Link may introduce coupling.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment and low diffusion risk for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing packet loss metrics via Teleoperation module interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add latency constraints to FR to balance packet loss and responsiveness.
Define clear interface ownership between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, adding latency constraints and clarifying interface ownership will improve requirement completeness and architectural clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: To include latency constraints and improve requirement completeness.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Teleoperation module can implement adaptive communication protocols.
open_risks: Potential interface duplication between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Performance data on packet loss and latency trade-offs.
